name: Lake Vyrnwy Circular
highlights: Fully waymarked tour of a glorious Victorian reservoir ringed by Sitka spruce.
points_of_interest: Vyrnwy dam tower (fairytale gothic); sculpture trail; RSPB reserve
parking_start: RSPB Lake Vyrnwy visitor centre car park (free)
food_drink_nearby: Lake Vyrnwy Hotel; Artisans Coffee Shop; Tavern Yr Efail
hazards_notes: Long loop — can combine with cycle hire; midges in summer
